MED-LIGHT GREY-GRREN-RED VULCANOCLASTIC ANDESITE . SOME SUB-ROUNDED CLASTS. GROUNDMASS IS MOSTLY FINE-MED GRAINED. IN THE INTERVAL, THE MAIN ALTERATION OBSERVED IS MODERATE PROPYLITIC ALTERATION WITH PERVASIVE DISTRIBUTION OF CHLORITE AND EPIDOTE. THE PRESENCE OF HEMATITE IN THE FORM OF PATCHES IS ALSO OBSERVED IN SOME CLASTS, AND THE ALTERATION OF MAGNETITE RANGES FROM WEAK TO MODERATE, DISTRIBUTED PERVASIVELY. THE PREDOMINANT VEINS IN THE INTERVAL ARE CALCITE VEINS.CHALCOPYRITE AND PYRITE ARE OBSERVED IN DISSEMINATED FORM.

GRAY MICRO-DIORITE WITH GREEN PATCHES, FINE TO MEDIUM GRAIN SIZE, SHOWING PERVASIVE PROPYLITIC ALTERATION WHERE BOTH CHLORITE AND EPIDOTE CAN BE IDENTIFIED. SOME SPOTS THAT LOOK LIKE DIORITE AND OTHERS THAT LOOK LIKE ANDESITE.THE PREDOMINANT VEINS IN THE INTERVAL ARE CALCITE VEINS. PYRITE IS OBSERVED IN DISSEMINATED FORM. THIS UNIT ONCE AGAIN IS SIMILAR TO THE VOLCANOCLASTIC ANDESITE, THE MAIN DIFFERENCE IS THE AVEREAGE GRAINSIZE IS SLIGHTLY LARGER AND LOOKING LIKE MICRO-DIORITE. CLASTS CAN STILL BE SEEN BUT ARE NOT AS FREQUENT AS ABOVE. KF 30 MAY 2023
NO CORE RECOVERED, DRILLERS TRI-CONED AND ADVANCED CASING TO 54M

WHITE MIN POSSIBLY PLAG ALTERED SOME TO CLAY, WHILE DARK MIN NOTED TP BE ALTERED TO CHLORITE AND MAGNETITE. CORE LOSS WITHIN THIS INTERVAL AS WELL WITH 1.45M RECOVERY. CASINGF AT 30M.

MED-DARK GREY CLAYEY SAND THAT IS PROBABLY FROM FAULTING. TOP ~80CM IS CLAY WITH SANDY ROCK FRAGMENTS IN IT, THE REST IS MOSTLY SANDY FRAGS WITH SOME CLAY. THE ROCK FRAGS LOOK LIKE THEY COULD BE THE SAME AS THE ANDESITE UNIT ABOVE BUT THEY LARGEST SIZE IS AROUND 0.3CM SO IT IS DIFFICULT TO TELL. SANDY FRAGMENTS COULD HAVE BEEN CAUSED BY THE DRILLING PROCESS AS THE DRILL WAS STRUGGLING TO DRILL THROUGH THIS UNIT.

REPEAT OF AND LITH. CONTAINS 10-15CM CLASTS OF MZN LITH. POSSIBLE ORDER OF EVENTS: INTRUSIVE MZN BODY FORMS, WEATHERING+EROSION TAKES PLACE, AND LITH FLOWS AROUND MZN OUTCROPS WHILE ALSO BREAKING OFF AND INCORPORATING CLASTS OF MZN, TILTING OF MZN + AND LITHS CREATING VERTICALLY ALTERNATING LITHS. BUT WHY IS MZN POT ALTERED WHEN AND LITH LARGELY ISNT? DID MZN ENABLE POT VEIN DIFFUSION? MZN-AND LITH CONTACTS ARE OFTEN SHARP + UNDULATING W/ NO EVIDENCE OF FAULTING. DATING OF MZN+AND LITHS WILL TELL US MORE ABOUT LITH RELATIONSHIPS.
AND FLOW RICH IN MZN CLASTS (MZN CLASTS FORMING >80% OF THIS SECTION). CONTRARY TO PREVIOUS MZN-CLAST-RICH SECTIONS, CCP DUSTING+SULFIDE VEINS REMAIN HIGH. LOCAL DECREASE IN MAG ALT IN MZN CLASTS.

INTERVAL STARTED WITH MONOMICTIC, CLAST SUPPORTED, KSPAR ALTERED MAG BXA. CLASTS ARE KSPAR ALTERED SET IN A ROCK FLOUR MATRIX.. CONTINUED DRILLING ON POTASSIC (KSPAR+BT+ACT) ) ALTERATION WHICH RETROGRADED TO PHYLLIC (SER>SIL>PY) ALTERATION, DIORITE. INTERVAL LOOKS TO BE HIGH ENERGY, POSSIBLY INTRUSION BRECCIA, MATRIX SUPPORTED, MONOMICTIC, SUBROUNDED CLASTS SET IN A ROCKFLOUR DARK MATRIX. FROM 737.6M OBSERVED A QTZ+SER+PY VEIN/STOCKWORK WITH KSPAR+BT HALO OBSERVED UNTIL 738.2M. CALCITE STRINGERS AND FRACTURE FILLS ALSO NOTED. 20% MED GRAINED PY DISSEMINATIONS, AS STRINGERS AND REPLACEMENT TO BT ALSO OBSERVED. ENCOUNTERED A MONOMICTIC, CLAST SUPPORED, MOD SORTED, SUBROUNDED HBX. KSPAR ALT CLASTS AND LIGHT GRY MASSIVE QTZ AS MATRIX, RETROGRADED TO PHYLLIC ALTERATION WITH CARB FILLINGS. 20% PY DISSEMINATIONS OBSERVED FROM 760.6M.
